description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa with a clean, rectangular silhouette and a solid, uniform coral-pink upholstery. The sofa features three distinct seat and back cushions, all of which are attached and evenly spaced, giving it a structured and minimalist appearance. The armrests are straight, broad, and extend at the same height as the backrest, providing a boxy and contemporary profile. The sofa sits on four sturdy, block-style wooden legs, which are visible and slightly recessed under the frame, adding a touch of warmth and stability. The upholstery appears smooth and matte, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, emphasizing its sleek and simple design. This piece would be suitable for urban environments such as public waiting areas, lobbies, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A modern, coral-pink three-seater sofa with straight armrests, attached cushions, and block wooden legs. The design is sleek, minimalist, and visually solid.
description_view_0: Front view showing three attached seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, boxy armrest and the depth of the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, unbroken backrest and the sofa's overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and depth, with visible block wooden legs.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three attached, uniform seat and back cushions arranged in a linear configuration, evenly spaced with no visible separation or tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, broad and flat with no decorative elements or padding contrast.
attribute_leg_design: Four block-style wooden legs, positioned at the corners, slightly recessed under the frame, with a visible brown wood texture.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with three attached, uniform back cushions and no visible tufting or segmentation beyond the cushion divisions.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid coral-pink color with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, textures, or decorative stitching.
